proposed_relations.description: Nostrand Avenue (southbound) and Rogers Avenue (northbound) form the paired BRT/SBS corridor from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay in Brooklyn, documented together in the same source presentation.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 9.3 miles from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay

decisions.rationale: Observation's base_record_id 'corridor_nostrand-avenue' matches existing registry record with the same id, which already contains the same source_id (2010_06_08_brt_nostrand_cb1), corridor name, borough, limits, and description. The observation resolves to its own base record — never link to self.
